caption: The video features Rishi Yadav, CEO of InfoObjects, seated in front of a backdrop that prominently displays "theCUBE" and "siliconANGLE." He is wearing a blue shirt with the InfoObjects logo on it and has a microphone attached to his ear, indicating he is engaged in an interview or discussion. The setting appears professional, likely part of a tech or business event. In the first frame, text overlays provide his name, Twitter handle (@meditativesoul), and title. The second frame shows a similar setup but without the text overlay, focusing more on the speaker and the branded backdrop. A book titled "Spark Cookbook" is visible on the table in front of him, suggesting the topic may be related to technology or data science. The video is sponsored by InfoObjects, as indicated by the logo in the corner.
